titleStmt.title: SII 31.196: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 196. (A.R. No. B 217 of 1938.) CHIḌIPIRĀLA, KAMLAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Vēṇugōpālaśvāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1442, Vikrama, Jyēshtha śu. 7, Wednesday corresponding to 1520 A.D., May 27.

Registers the gift of land measuring kha 110 for the maintanance of a choultry (feeding house) situated on the way leading to Tirumala for the maintanance to the ascetics, Chātāni Vaishnavas, Brahmins, devotees (dāsānudāsalu), merchants of native and foreign lands (sūradēsisu, paradēsulu) pilgrims of the Tirumala for the (festivals ?) of Tiruvēngaḷanātha at Tirumala and also for dharmasatram at Chadupurāla by Chanayya, son of Gurujepalli Narasappayya for the merit of Timmarusayya and Gōvindayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Aviṣnumastu . śrīrāmacaṁdrāyanamaḥ svastiśrī ja
yābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1442 na
Agunēṭi vikrama saṁvatsara jēṣṭha śu 7 bu śrīmatu gurujē
palli narasappayyaṁgāri komāruṁḍu ceṁnnayyagāru
tama pāliṭi svāmi tiruveṁgaḷanāthuni tirumala tirunā
ḷaku naḍacēvarusaku satraṁ peṭṭē Aṭṭugānu cadipirēla grā
ma maṁdu peṭṭagaṭṭaḍasēsi dha¨rmasatraṁ tiṁmmarusayyavāriki
nni gōviṁdayyavārikiṁnni puṇyaṁgānu veṁkaṭādri dāsu
laku cātina vaiṣṭhavulaku cātānivaiṣṇavula brāṁhma
laku brāṁhmalu modalaina Appanidāsānu dā
sulakunu suradēsi paradēsi modalai svāmikoṁḍala
rāyani tī¨rthavāsulakunnu tha¨rmmasattaruvu sāgiṁcina tha
¨rmasāsanaṁ . mākunu gōviṁdarāju voḍiyalu pāliṁci
na cadisirēlagrāmamaṁdu grāmānaku dakṣiṇānanu ceruvu
toṭṭunanu mōṭṭarēgaḍi staḷamanē pēragala cēnu kha . 0 Icē
nu paṁdumuṁnnu cadipirēla viṭici pemareḍi koḍuku
Akasuvayya Āpeddayya nāgayyamodalaina jana jariki
vaṭirāyani tha¨rmma satraṁ cēnu kha . 0 mī vaṁśaṁ
mu mīru mīputrapautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu Anu
cēnunu lessa vevasāyaṁ sēsukoni tirumala ma
paruṣavāriki satraṁveṭṭi sukhānabraduku vā
traṁ cēniki yēkālānakuṁnnu yavvaru ganaka
[¨rmma]ṁ talacinānu tamatalli taṁḍṟlakunu vāra
pāpāna bōvuvāru gaṁgakaṟuta
vāru brahmatyaśrīhatya

svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ paradattāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ ni
ṣphalaṁbhavēt dēvadravyaṁ gurudravyaṁ vipra
dravyaṁ tadhaivaca vupēkṣitāni bhakṣāṇi
kulakṣayaṁ midaṁ bhavēt . svādattāṁ
paradattāṁ maṁvōharēti vasuṁdharā sa
ṣṭhivva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
Digital edition of SII 31.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
